name: snowflake-policy-guardrails
description: Implement Snowflake governance guardrails with network rules, session policies, authentication policies, and automated compliance checks. Use when enforcing security policies, implementing data governance, or configuring automated compliance for Snowflake. Trigger with phrases like "snowflake policy", "snowflake guardrails", "snowflake governance", "snowflake compliance", "snowflake enforce".
